The '''Plynn system''' was a star system located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]].

{{System-stub}}
